{{Infobox technique
| name = Empty Palm
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Empty Palm Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Empty]] Palm is a specialized combat technique originally developed by an individual with limited talent who used it as a way to compensate for his lack of natural ability. The technique functions by focusing neutral [[madra]] into a palm thrust, which allows the user to bypass or cancel out the specific aspects of an opponent's spirit. When successfully landed on a person's core, it disrupts their [[madra]] and interrupts their control over their entire spirit, often leaving them powerless or unable to move for several seconds. While highly effective against humans, the technique has different effects on spirits; it can blast away their physical material or dissolve them entirely. The technique is categorized as a [[Striker]] move and can be modified through various methods. It has been used to inject [[madra]] into [[scripts]], executed through kicks, or enhanced by [[Forging]] massive, oversized imprints of the palm that can cover an opponent's entire body. Users have also integrated other elements, such as [[soulfire]] or the properties of [[pure madra]], to increase its potency. Despite its effectiveness, it can be physically exhausting to use at full power and requires precise [[madra]] control to ensure the energy is injected with the correct amount of force. Because it allows a practitioner to affect enemies on their own level, it is considered a remarkable tool for combat.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Empty]] Palm is a combat technique utilized by [[Lindon]] that functions by concentrating [[madra]] at the base of his palm to produce an invisible, thorn-like effect. When deployed, this strike drives into an opponent like a hammer hitting a nail, reaching only a few inches deep to inject energy directly into the enemy's core. This method of combat disrupts the spirit of the target and is powerful enough to allow a [[sacred artist]] to affect an opponent on their own level. [[Lindon]] found the technique perfectly suited to his needs and employed it during his various fights, including a successful strike against [[Markuth]]'s core.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Empty Palm]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] that involves focusing [[madra]] at the base of the palm to create an invisible thorn-like effect.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Empty Palm]] lands with an invisible thorn that drives into the opponent like a hammer driving a nail.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Empty Palm]] is a technique that disrupts the enemy's spirit with an injection into the core.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] finds the [[Empty Palm]] to be perfectly suited for him.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]] in his fights.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] landed an [[Empty Palm]] on [[Markuth]]'s core.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Empty Palm]] is a technique that allows a [[sacred artist]] to affect an enemy on the same level.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique that only reaches a few inches.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Empty]] Palm is a strike technique utilized by the red man [[construct]]. This method of combat is capable of blasting large chunks out of [[Remnants]], though employing its full power results in the rapid exhaustion of the user. During his training, [[Lindon]] utilizes a primitive [[Striker technique]] that functions more like an [[Empty]] Palm than a hurled fireball.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The full use of the [[Empty Palm]] technique exhausts the user quickly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Empty Palm]] technique blasts chunks out of [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique used by the red man [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The primitive [[Striker technique]] [[Lindon]] uses is more like an [[Empty Palm]] than a hurled fireball.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Empty Palm]] is a strike technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique [[Lindon]] has recorded notes on.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Empty Palm]] is the only real technique in [[Lindon]]'s [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique [[Lindon]] wants to improve.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Empty Palm]] can be used to disable an enemy's core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Empty Palm]] can be used to light up concentric rings on a script.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] gathered [[madra]] into his [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] worked on the [[Empty Palm]] technique using [[Akura Fury]]'s advice.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Empty]] Palm is a specialized technique designed to slam directly into a target's core. To incorporate [[Hollow King]] [[madra]], the method would require complete reinvention. During his journey, [[Lindon]] utilized the technique to blast a chunk out of the storm gecko known as [[Remnant]]. He later applied the [[Empty]] Palm against [[Daji]] before successfully using it to strike the core of an enemy [[Underlord]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique used to slam into a target's core.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Empty Palm]] is a technique that would require reinvention to adopt [[Hollow King]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used [[Empty Palm]] to blast a chunk out of the storm gecko Remnant.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique on [[Daji]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used his [[Empty Palm]] to strike an enemy [[Underlord]]’s core.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Empty Palm]] is a technique [[Lindon]] used to take down Teris' father.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Empty Palm]] technique wipes out [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique that drives [[madra]] from a target's core.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Empty]] Palm technique was first utilized by [[Little Blue]] before being employed by [[Lindon]] against a group of silver bats. This ability functions by washing a human's madra channels clean and stripping them of control over their spirit, though it can blast away the physical material of a spirit. [[Lindon]] later applied the technique to meet acidic liquid and successfully executed a version infused with [[soulfire]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Little Blue]] uses the [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used an [[Empty Palm]] against the silver bats.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Empty Palm]] washes a human's madra channels clean and robs them of control over their spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|On a spirit, the [[Empty Palm]] blasts away the material of their body.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a [[soulfire]]-infused [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique to meet acidic liquid.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique that can be [[Forged]] into a giant shape.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] used an oversized, blue-white palm strike of [[pure madra]] called [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] met [[Northstrider]]'s punch with an [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As [[Lindon]]'s first and oldest technique, the [[Empty]] Palm is a skill he has worked to perfect more than any other. He demonstrated its utility by disarming an [[Archlord]]’s puppet construct and using it to dissolve an arrow. During combat, [[Little Blue]] utilized the technique on a scale equal to her human body to wipe out various [[Striker techniques]]. [[Lindon]] also manifested the ability as a projected blue-white handprint, and at its most powerful, the [[Empty]] Palm can cover the sky and warp the regional [[aura]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Empty Palm]] disarmed an [[Archlord]]’s puppet construct.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] used an [[Empty Palm]] the size of her new human body to wipe out [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used an [[Empty Palm]] that projected a blue-white handprint.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Empty]] Palms is a technique that covers the sky and warps regional [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Empty Palm]] is [[Lindon]]'s first and oldest technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Empty Palm]] can dissolve an arrow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Empty Palm]] is a technique he has perfected the most.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Empty Palm]] is a technique used by [[Bloody Thorn]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“That Empty Palm you worked out? Looks to me like a Striker move.”

“It only reaches a few inches.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
